project/puissance4.name: Connect Four — Responsive and customizable web game
project/puissance4.shortDescription: Playable Connect Four on web/mobile with customizable avatars and colors.
project/puissance4.longDescription:
Contexte

Web version of Connect Four in HTML/CSS/JavaScript: solid game logic, responsive interface and customization (avatar, pawn colors). Playable with friends, including on mobile. Perfect for demonstrating mastery of the DOM, events and simple but robust JS patterns.

Problème

Offer a classic game accessible online without friction.

Solution

A lightweight, customizable web app playable everywhere.

Fonctionnalités principales

Avatar and color customization, two-player games, touch interface, score and session saving.

Résultats

A small, accessible, fun and extensible game (scores, multi-sessions, saves).
project/puissance4.metaTitle: Connect Four – Responsive and customizable web game
project/puissance4.metaDescription: Web version of Connect Four: customizable avatars and colors, playable on mobile. Fluid interface and robust game logic to play with friends.

project/spotify.name: Spotify Clone — Music site with web player and library
project/spotify.shortDescription: Spotify clone in React + PHP API: library, categories, player, artist pages.
project/spotify.longDescription:
Contexte

3-day rush project: recreate a Spotify-like experience with category navigation, artist pages, and functional audio player.

Problème

Quickly prototype a modern music application with a dedicated API.

Solution

Frontend in React with Redux Toolkit; backend in PHP for endpoints and data management.

Fonctionnalités principales

Category navigation, artist pages, audio player, state management and routing.

Résultats

Demonstrates the ability to quickly prototype a media app with a modern frontend and dedicated API, managing state, routing, and audio playback.
project/spotify.metaTitle: Spotify Clone – Music site with web player
project/spotify.metaDescription: Music site prototype: library, categories, artist pages, and audio player. Quick project demonstrating an experience close to a streaming service.

project/driving-school.name: Driving School — Management and scheduling for driving schools
project/driving-school.shortDescription: Management of driving schools: students, instructors, schedules, appointments, and driving hours.
project/driving-school.longDescription:
Contexte

Business web application for driving schools: creation of students/instructors, management of availability, scheduling of driving hours, and tracking of appointments.

Problème

Centralize daily organization to save time and avoid double bookings.

Solution

Stack: Vue 3 + TypeScript + TailwindCSS on the front end and Python/Flask API on the server side.

Fonctionnalités principales

Student and instructor management, slot scheduling, appointment tracking, dashboard.

Résultats

A clear, scalable project (notifications, billing, exports) and suitable for SMEs.
project/driving-school.metaTitle: Driving School – Driving School Management and Scheduling
project/driving-school.metaDescription: Business application for driving schools: management of students and instructors, scheduling of driving hours and appointments for simplified organization.

project/nextodo.name: Nextodo — Kanban-style to-do list with drag & drop
project/nextodo.shortDescription: Trello-style to-do list: columns, tasks, drag-and-drop, and visual organization.
project/nextodo.longDescription:
Contexte

Nextodo is a task manager inspired by Trello: create columns, cards, and reorganize with drag-and-drop to prioritize and track progress.

Problème

Illustrate UX, reusable components, and modern front-end patterns.

Solution

Tech: Next.js, React, and CSS. A clean base to explore persistence, authentication, and filtered views.

Fonctionnalités principales

Columns and cards, drag-and-drop, visual prioritization.

Résultats

Ideal for structuring your projects and boosting productivity.
project/nextodo.metaTitle: Nextodo – Kanban-style to-do list with drag & drop
project/nextodo.metaDescription: Create columns and tasks, organize with drag-and-drop, and track your progress. Ideal for structuring your projects and boosting productivity.

project/gestion-temps.name: Time Management Software (Kodeva) — Weekly entry & validation
project/gestion-temps.shortDescription: Time tracking by task/project, weekly validation and HR/finance reporting.
project/gestion-temps.longDescription:
Contexte

Time management application for field teams and offices: quick entry (desktop/mobile), organization by task/project/site, management of breaks and travel.

Problème

Simplify the approval of hours and identify anomalies (absences, inconsistencies) at a glance.

Solution

Stack: Nuxt.js, Vue.js, TypeScript for the front end; C# .NET backend with MongoDB/MSSQL for consolidated reports and precise analysis.

Fonctionnalités principales

Entry by task/project/site, weekly validation workflow, HR and finance reporting.

Résultats

Goal: reliability of time tracking, managerial visibility and smooth approval process.
project/gestion-temps.metaTitle: Time Management Software – Weekly Entry & Validation
project/gestion-temps.metaDescription: Time entry by task/project, weekly validation, anomaly detection and consolidated reporting for reliable and transparent time management.

project/izidoor.name: Izidoor — Sports & leisure booking platform | SaaS
project/izidoor.shortDescription: SaaS platform for managing bookings for sports and leisure facilities.
project/izidoor.longDescription:
Contexte

Izidoor is a SaaS booking and back-office platform dedicated to sports clubs and leisure facilities (sailing, skiing, kayaking, etc.). It unifies online booking and operational management: scheduling, product catalog, employee management, invoicing, and a cash register module for on-site payment.

Problème

Digitize often fragmented processes, increase conversion rates, and reduce administrative burden.

Solution

Technically, Izidoor relies on Nuxt.js, Vue.js, and TypeScript on the front end, GraphQL for a clear API-first approach, PostgreSQL for data reliability, and TailwindCSS for a fast and accessible UI.

Fonctionnalités principales

Online booking, scheduling, catalog, team management, invoicing, cash register. Designed for seasonal peaks.

Résultats

A smooth experience for end users and a robust business tool for field teams.
project/izidoor.metaTitle: Izidoor – Sports & Leisure Booking Platform | SaaS
project/izidoor.metaDescription: Booking and back-office platform for sports and leisure facilities: scheduling, cash register, invoicing, team and product management. Reliable and scalable SaaS solution.

project/reddit-tauri-app.name: Reddit Tauri App — Desktop & mobile Reddit client
project/reddit-tauri-app.shortDescription: Multi-platform Reddit client (desktop/mobile) with Tauri, Vue, and Rust.
project/reddit-tauri-app.longDescription:
Contexte

Cross-platform Reddit application: navigation through posts, subreddits, comments, OAuth, integration with official REST and GraphQL APIs. Tauri enables a lightweight and performant desktop executable, while Capacitor opens the door to mobile.

Problème

Offer a smooth Reddit experience on desktop and mobile with a single codebase.

Solution

The modern Vue interface offers a smooth and reactive experience. This project illustrates the synergy between Rust and JavaScript and the creation of secure hybrid applications.

Fonctionnalités principales

Post/subreddit/comment navigation, OAuth, REST and GraphQL APIs, desktop (Tauri) and mobile (Capacitor).

Résultats

A great playground for authentication, state management, caching, and multi-platform architecture patterns.
project/reddit-tauri-app.metaTitle: Reddit Tauri App – Desktop & Mobile Reddit Client
project/reddit-tauri-app.metaDescription: Modern and lightweight Reddit client: OAuth authentication, post, subreddit, and comment navigation. Smooth experience on desktop and mobile.

project/aparteasy.name: ApartEasy — Centralize and share your real estate listings
project/aparteasy.shortDescription: Collaborative application to centralize, rate, and share real estate listings.
project/aparteasy.longDescription:
Contexte

ApartEasy simplifies real estate search by centralizing favorite listings and facilitating collaboration (friends, roommates, couples). Each listing can be rated, assigned a status (called, visited, available), and viewed on an interactive map with estimated travel times.

Problème

Decide faster, with a shared view and objective criteria.

Solution

Stack: AdonisJS (API), MariaDB (data), Docker (orchestration), Vue.js + TypeScript (front-end), and TailwindCSS (UI). The project focuses on UX (simplicity, accessibility) and productivity (sorting, search, group collaboration).

Fonctionnalités principales

Centralize favorites, ratings and statuses, interactive map, collaboration, travel times.

Résultats

Remaining extensible (authentication, notifications, roles).
project/aparteasy.metaTitle: ApartEasy – Centralize and share your real estate listings
project/aparteasy.metaDescription: Collaborative application to centralize, rate, and share listings. Interactive map, statuses, teamwork to speed up housing search.

project/ai-pneumonia-detector.name: AI Pneumonia Detector — Online AI-based pneumonia detection
project/ai-pneumonia-detector.shortDescription: AI application for detecting pneumonia from chest X-rays.
project/ai-pneumonia-detector.longDescription:
Contexte

AI Pneumonia Detector compares two machine learning approaches for pneumonia detection from radiographic images: CNN (TensorFlow/PyTorch) and KNN (Scikit-learn). The user can test X-rays (examples provided) and get an instant prediction, along with detailed metrics (precision, recall, F1-score), confusion matrices, and ROC curves to understand model performance.

Problème

Understand model performance and demonstrate medical AI in an educational way.

Solution

The Vue.js/TailwindCSS front-end ensures a clear interface, while the Python/FastAPI (Uvicorn) back-end orchestrates pre-processing and inference. The project highlights medical AI pedagogy, reproducibility (Jupyter, nbconvert/nbformat), and optimization (Pandas/NumPy, memory management psutil/GPUtil).

Fonctionnalités principales

X-ray testing, instant prediction, metrics (precision, recall, F1), confusion matrices, ROC curves.

Résultats

A concrete demonstration of data science applied to health with open-source technologies.
project/ai-pneumonia-detector.metaTitle: AI Pneumonia Detector – Online AI-based pneumonia detection
project/ai-pneumonia-detector.metaDescription: Health web application to analyze chest X-rays and detect pneumonia. Online demo with predictions, confusion matrices, and ROC curves to evaluate models.

project/stockpme.name: Stockpme — Inventory management software for SMEs
project/stockpme.shortDescription: Inventory management for SMEs: products, warehouses, movements, transfers, corrections, QR labels.
project/stockpme.longDescription:
Contexte

Stockpme modernizes inventory management for SMEs: creation of detailed product sheets, references, real-time stock level tracking, transfers between locations, inventory corrections, and reporting. The professional label module with QR codes improves traceability and speeds up field operations.

Problème

Reduce stockouts, limit overstocking, and ensure the reliability of the supply chain.

Solution

Hybrid stack: Nuxt.js/Vue.js/TypeScript on the front end, C# .NET backend with MongoDB and MSSQL storage to combine flexibility and analytical querying.

Fonctionnalités principales

Product sheets, references, real-time levels, transfers, corrections, reporting, QR labels.

Résultats

Goal: supply chain reliability and operational efficiency.
project/stockpme.metaTitle: Stockpme – Inventory management software for SMEs
project/stockpme.metaDescription: Product tracking, transfers, corrections, inventories, and QR labels for complete traceability. Designed to improve the logistics efficiency of SMEs.

project/primea-rp.name: Primea RP — GTA 5 RolePlay server website
project/primea-rp.shortDescription: Website for a French GTA 5 RP server: onboarding, rules, guides, and resources.
project/primea-rp.longDescription:
Contexte

Community website for Primea RP (GTA 5 RolePlay). It centralizes presentation, rules, controls, procedures to join the server, and useful resources.

Problème

Reduce friction upon entry and promote good RP practices.

Solution

Tech: Nuxt.js, Vue.js, TypeScript, SCSS. Clear architecture, easily maintainable by the admin team.

Fonctionnalités principales

Presentation, rules, controls, join procedures, resources, onboarding.

Résultats

An example of a web tool dedicated to a gaming community, focused on accessibility, clarity, and visual consistency.
project/primea-rp.metaTitle: Primea RP – GTA 5 RolePlay Server Website
project/primea-rp.metaDescription: Community website for a GTA 5 RP server: presentation, rules, guides, and access. Clear onboarding process to join the roleplay community.

project/epitrip.name: EpiTrip — Natural language travel planner
project/epitrip.shortDescription: Natural language (NLP) travel planner with SNCF routes and interactive map.
project/epitrip.longDescription:
Contexte

EpiTrip understands free sentences ("I'm leaving Rennes to go to Biarritz"), validates the travel intent, extracts cities (departure/arrival) via NER (CamemBERT, DistilBERT, FastText), then calculates an optimal route based on SNCF data and a graph algorithm like Dijkstra. The results are displayed on an interactive map with steps, durations, and a clear summary.

Problème

Make travel planning accessible in natural language (and optionally by voice).

Solution

Front: Nuxt 3, Vue 3, TypeScript, TailwindCSS. Business Backend: AdonisJS. AI Backend: Python/FastAPI (Transformers, PyTorch, scikit-learn, Pandas, Matplotlib) with optional voice recognition (SpeechRecognition).

Fonctionnalités principales

Natural language input, NER for cities, SNCF route calculation, interactive map, optional voice recognition.

Résultats

The project demonstrates a concrete application of NLP and AI to travel, accessible and educational.
project/epitrip.metaDescription: Enter or dictate your route, the AI understands your request, extracts departure/arrival and calculates the optimal route with display on interactive map.
